allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if v.startswith\('18.'\)]; print\(vs[-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if v.startswith\('0.76.'\)]; print\(vs[-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', list\(p.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p['version']\); print\('main:', p.get\('main',''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('./node_modules/react-native-reanimated/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', r.version\); const exports = Object.keys\(r.exports || {}\); console.log\('has exports:', exports.length > 0\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); ['src/data/ranges.js','src/screens/PreflopScreen.js','src/screens/PlayScreen.js'].forEach\(f => { try { fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\); console.log\('OK:', f\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERR:', f, e.message\); }}\)")
